seoTitle: Parma vs Parraweena — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Parma and Parraweena. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Parma and Parraweena.
heading: Parma vs Parraweena — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Parma, New South Wales and Parraweena, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Parraweena has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Parma (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Parma or Parraweena safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Parma has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Parraweena scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Parma scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Parraweena scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Parma or Parraweena?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Parraweena has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
